frontmatter.title: OpenCode Analysis
frontmatter.summary: Deep dive into the OpenCode architecture, plugin system, and Effect-TS service composition.

html:
OpenCode Analysis

This document explores the OpenCode architecture in detail.

Plugin System

OpenCode uses a hook-based plugin architecture that allows extensions to intercept and modify agent behavior at key points.

Hook Types

The system supports several hook types including chat.message, tool.execute.before, and tool.execute.after.

Effect-TS Service Composition

The core services are composed using Effect-TS, providing type-safe dependency injection and error handling.

Layer Pattern

Services are defined as Layers that can be composed and torn down dynamically.

Conclusions

The architecture demonstrates a clean separation of concerns with well-defined extension points.
